Uloma
Okoro

Lawyer  ·  AI Governance & Public Policy Researcher

AI governance and policy researcher with 18+ years of experience across corporate law, regulatory compliance, fintech, insurance, and technology governance. Leading Africa-facing work within the AULA Fellowship for Safe AI and coordinating cross-jurisdictional research on AI governance across 22 institutions.

Shaping Governance
for an AI-Driven World

18+
Years Experience

Publications

Research Group Members

Active Fellowships

Lawyer, compliance leader and policy researcher with 18+ years of experience across corporate law, fintech, insurance, aviation and technology governance. My current work focuses on AI governance, digital policy, comparative regulation and institutional readiness.

I lead Africa-facing work within the AULA Fellowship for Safe AI, coordinate cross-jurisdictional research on AI governance, and produce policy-relevant analysis for academic, institutional and professional audiences.

AI Governance Digital Policy Comparative Regulation Algorithmic Accountability Regulatory Compliance Policy Brief Writing Qualitative Research Stakeholder Engagement Ethical AI Global South Policy Data Governance Risk Governance

Professional Experience

A Career at the
Intersection of Law
and Governance

Feb 2025 – Present
Global Accelerex Limited
Fintech · Lagos
Head of Legal & Compliance
  • Lead legal, regulatory and compliance strategy within a fintech environment, with regular engagement on governance, product risk and emerging digital regulation.
  • Prepare policy notes, executive briefs and regulatory analyses for leadership, translating complex legal and technical issues into decision-ready guidance.
  • Support organisational readiness for evolving frameworks on AI, data governance, payments regulation and digital compliance.
2022 – 2024
PAC Solicitors
Lagos
Managing Associate, Technology Policy & Governance
  • Conducted research and advisory work for clients in regulated and technology-intensive sectors, with a focus on governance, compliance, data protection and emerging technology policy.
  • Drafted policy notes, compliance guidance and institutional governance documents aligned with changing legal and regulatory expectations.
  • Designed and delivered workshops on AI governance, technology risk and institutional accountability for legal and corporate audiences.
2017 – 2021
Cornerstone Insurance Plc
Lagos
Head of Legal, Data Protection & Compliance
  • Led organisation-wide legal, compliance and data protection work, embedding governance standards into business processes and senior decision-making.
  • Prepared board and executive papers, policy submissions and internal governance materials for management review.
  • Supported regulatory audits, institutional reporting and enterprise-level accountability processes.

Insurance, Aviation &
Corporate Practice
Senior Legal & Governance Roles

Held senior legal and governance roles involving board support, regulatory liaison, risk management, institutional reporting and stakeholder engagement across multiple sectors.

2024 – Present
International Research
Collective
Coordinator, Cross-Jurisdictional AI Governance Research Group
  • Lead a 22-member research group of lawyers and policy professionals working on comparative AI governance across jurisdictions.
  • Coordinate research design, writing workflows, peer review, quality assurance and the conversion of research into policy-facing outputs.
